'''zharaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zean|zean]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-r-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zean|zean]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zharaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæræyæth|zhæræyæth]] || [[word:zhæræyæj|zhæræyæj]] || [[word:zhæræyæsh|zhæræyæsh]] || [[word:zhæræyæ|zhæræyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhararayath|zhararayath]] || [[word:zhararayaj|zhararayaj]] || [[word:zhararayash|zhararayash]] || [[word:zhararaya|zhararaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zharayath|zharayath]] || [[word:zharayaj|zharayaj]] || [[word:zharayash|zharayash]] || [[word:zharaya|zharaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zharafyath|zharafyath]] || [[word:zharafyaj|zharafyaj]] || [[word:zharafyash|zharafyash]] || [[word:zharafyaf|zharafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zharayatha|zharayatha]] || [[word:zharayaja|zharayaja]] || [[word:zharayasha|zharayasha]] || [[word:zharayaka|zharayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zharayath|zharayath]] || [[word:zharayaj|zharayaj]] || [[word:zharayash|zharayash]] || [[word:zharaya|zharaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zharayathal|zharayathal]] || [[word:zharayajal|zharayajal]] || [[word:zharayashal|zharayashal]] || [[word:zharayakal|zharayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zharayathatha|zharayathatha]] || [[word:zharayajaja|zharayajaja]] || [[word:zharayashasha|zharayashasha]] || [[word:zharayaka|zharayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zharayathan|zharayathan]] || [[word:zharayajan|zharayajan]] || [[word:zharayashan|zharayashan]] || [[word:zharayakan|zharayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zharayathaoro|zharayathaoro]] || [[word:zharayajaoro|zharayajaoro]] || [[word:zharayashaoro|zharayashaoro]] || [[word:zharayakaoro|zharayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
